items.text: The door lock system will not operate when the door is open.
The door lock system will not operate when the door is open.
After the door is unlocked with the Honda Smart Key, if the door is not opened within approximately 30 seconds, it will automatically be locked again.
After the door is unlocked with the Honda Smart Key, if the door is not opened within approximately 30 seconds, it will automatically be locked again.
Ensure that the door lock system operates reliably prior to inspection.
Ensure that the door lock system operates reliably prior to inspection.

blocks.text: Place the Honda Smart Key (B) in close contact with the back of the special tool (A). Press the button on the Honda Smart Key. If the indicator for the special tool does not light up after the battery has been replaced and inspected again, replace the Honda Smart Key with a good one, Register your Honda Smart Key.

items.text: If the indicator light (C) on the special tool illuminates, the Honda Smart Key is in good working order.
If the indicator light (C) on the special tool illuminates, the Honda Smart Key is in good working order.
If the indicator light does not come on, Replace the battery (CR1632) and Inspect again.
If the indicator light does not come on, Replace the battery (CR1632) and Inspect again.
